summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. World Cup hub (groups+bracket+countdown+prize), Predictions UX (date grouping + logos + my-points + lock), Fantasy UX (mini pitch + stats bar + captain/vice/remove), and StatPal logo enrichment all verified end-to-end. 5/5 backend pytest cases pass. All required data-testids resolve. Football dashboard regression (sportmonks/api-sports logos) is healthy with 0 broken images.
critical_code_review_comments: Pages WorldCupHub.jsx / Predictions.jsx / Fantasy.jsx are >700 lines candidates if they keep growing — consider extracting BracketView, MiniPitch, GroupCard into /components for future maintainability.

ingestion._enrich_statpal_logos token-set fuzzy match is fine for now (72/127 = 57% coverage; remaining 55 are genuinely obscure clubs absent from teams collection). For more coverage main agent could add a secondary fallback to country-code / nation lookup.
test_credentials: admin@cloudypitch.com / CloudyAdmin2026! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — sign-in worked and cookie session was applied
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-3 features (WC hub UI, Predictions polish, Fantasy polish, StatPal logo enrichment) are passing. Backend regression file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py runs in <1s and is safe for CI. World Cup endpoints currently return 12 groups (FIFA 48-team format, 4 teams/group) starting 2026-06-11. StatPal football logo coverage is exactly 72/127 (spec floor: 70). Football dashboard root path is '/' not '/football'.

detailed_findings.worldcup_backend: GET /api/worldcup → 12 groups A-L, starts_at=2026-06-11, prize_pool+competition keys present. /groups and /bracket also OK (Round of 32 + Final included).
detailed_findings.worldcup_frontend: worldcup-hub mounts; wc-hub-countdown text '14Days03Hours08Mins27Secs' updating; all 4 tabs (groups/bracket/schedule/prize) switchable; all 12 group cards (A-L) render with 4 flag images each (48 flagcdn.com images on Groups tab); bracket-view renders 12/12 R32 cards and 8/8 R16; Schedule tab shows expected empty state; Prize tab shows wc-prize-cta CTA.
detailed_findings.predictions: predictions-hub mounts with 80 pred-match cards. Each card has pred-home, pred-away, input-home, input-away, pred-submit testids + 2 team-logo images. Inputs disabled while signed-out, become enabled after sign-in. pred-leaderboard panel renders. my-points renders only when signed in (text='0' for fresh admin). Date headers visible in upper-case format ('WED, MAY 27' etc) — matches spec pattern.
detailed_findings.fantasy: fantasy-hub, fantasy-stats, fantasy-pitch all present without auth. Player list shows 200 players with position pills (GK/DEF/MID/FWD). Clicking a player adds it to squad and produces captain-{id}/vice-{id}/remove-{id} buttons. Stats bar updates live ('Squad 1/15 · Starters 1/11 · Bank £95.0m · Spent £5.0m'). fantasy-save-btn ('Save Squad') only renders when signed-in (signed-out users see fantasy-signin-cta 'Sign in to save' instead) — verified after admin login.
detailed_findings.statpal_logos: Direct MongoDB count: 127 total statpal football matches, 72 with both home+away logos (≥70 spec floor). No regression on sportmonks/api-sports: /api/matches?sport=football returns 100% logo coverage on sampled sportmonks+api-sports matches; root '/' dashboard renders 397 images (91 sportmonks + 306 api-sports + 0 other-logo + 0 broken).
